# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: "3.8"

networks:
  elk-stack:

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: elasticsearch:7.17.3
    networks:
      - elk-stack
    environment:
      discovery.type: single-node

  logstash:
    image: logstash:7.17.3
    networks:
      - elk-stack
    volumes:
      - ./logstash.conf:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline/logstash.conf:ro

  kibana:
    image: kibana:7.17.3
    networks:
      - elk-stack
    environment:
      ELASTICSEARCH_URL: elasticsearch:9200

  apm-server:
    image: apm/apm-server:8.4.1
    networks:
      - elk-stack
    volumes:
      - ./apm-server.conf:/usr/share/apm-server/config/apm-server.yml:ro
    environment:
      ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS: elasticsearch:9200
